mapper.select:
SELECT s.name AS studentName, scl.remark AS changeReason, scl.credit AS changeCredit, scl.current_credit AS currentCredit, scl.remark AS remark, scl.add_time AS changeTime FROM student_credit_log scl LEFT JOIN student s ON scl.student_id = s.id
AND (s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.studentName}, '%') OR s.idcard LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.studentName}, '%'))
AND s.user_id IN (SELECT id FROM user WHERE mobile = #{condition.phone})
AND scl.remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.changeReason}, '%')
AND scl.add_time >= #{condition.startDate}
AND scl.add_time <= #{condition.endDate}
ORDER BY scl.add_time DESC
